scripts.db:check: node -e "require('dotenv').config(); const { Client } = require('pg'); const url = process.env.MIGRATION_DATABASE_URL || process.env.DATABASE_URL; if (!url) throw new Error('DATABASE_URL o MIGRATION_DATABASE_URL requerido'); const c = new Client({ connectionString: url, ssl: { rejectUnauthorized: false }, connectionTimeoutMillis: 5000 }); c.connect().then(async () => { console.log('connected'); console.table((await c.query('select current_database(), current_user')).rows); await c.end(); }).catch((e) => { console.error(e); process.exit(1); });"
scripts.db:tables: node -e "require('dotenv').config(); const { Client } = require('pg'); const url = process.env.MIGRATION_DATABASE_URL || process.env.DATABASE_URL; if (!url) throw new Error('DATABASE_URL o MIGRATION_DATABASE_URL requerido'); const c = new Client({ connectionString: url, ssl: { rejectUnauthorized: false }, connectionTimeoutMillis: 5000 }); c.connect().then(async () => { console.table((await c.query('select table_schema, table_name from information_schema.tables where table_schema = \'public\' order by table_name')).rows); await c.end(); }).catch((e) => { console.error(e); process.exit(1); });"
